steps.title: Identify what the passage does
steps.content: The passage presents a structural characteristic of the series and contrasts two opposing views on how to interpret it.

steps.title: Match the pattern to the choices
steps.content: C describes exactly what the passage does: identify a characteristic and present two differing viewpoints on it. The other choices either introduce unsupported claims or misrepresent the passage's argument. That matches choice C — C is correct.
